allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([t['name'] for t in d.get\('results',[]\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:',d['count']\); [print\(' ',r\) for r in d['data'][:3]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\" {t['labels']['job']:12s} {t['health']:8s} {t['scrapeUrl']}\\"\) for t in d['data']['activeTargets']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\" {t['labels']['job']:12s} {t['health']}\\"\) for t in d['data']['activeTargets']]")
Bash(echo "jobs now: $\(docker compose exec -T flink-jobmanager /opt/flink/bin/flink list)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('revenue rows:',d['count']\); [print\(' ',r['region'],r['revenue_hour'],round\(r['gross_revenue']\)\) for r in d['data']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);[print\(f\\" {t['labels']['job']:11s} {t['health']}\\"\) for t in d['data']['activeTargets'] if t['labels']['job']=='flink']")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);[print\(' asset:', '.'.join\(n['assetKey']['path']\)\) for n in d['data']['assetNodes']]")
Bash(curl -s localhost:8100/ask -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"What temperature must vaccines stay within and what happens on an excursion?"}')
Bash(echo "  total running: $\(docker compose --profile bi --profile observability --profile ml --profile orchestration --profile rag ps -q)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;[print\(' ',{k:r.get\(k\) for k in \('supplier_id','name','on_time_rate','__deleted'\)}\) for r in \(json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;[print\(' ',{k:r.get\(k\) for k in \('supplier_id','on_time_rate','risk_score','__deleted'\)}\) for r in \(json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)\) if r.get\('supplier_id'\)=='SUP-003']")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;[print\(' ',{k:r.get\(k\) for k in \('po_id','sku','quantity','status'\)}\) for r in \(json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)\) if r.get\('po_id'\)=='PO-9999']")
